intro: This week on InstantViral Learn: Social Media Marketing for Small Businesses. Pick one primary platform where customers already are, publish proof and offers, and measure inquiries — not vanity alone. Expand only after a repeatable cadence works.
mainSummary: Pick one primary platform where customers already are, publish proof and offers, and measure inquiries — not vanity alone. Expand only after a repeatable cadence works.
